subject: [PATCH v5 07/36] mm/memory_hotplug: disallow migration-driven private node hotunplug

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch prevents the hotunplug of private node memory that is being migrated, as this can lead to unsafe conditions. Instead of attempting to hotunplug the memory, it fails the operation and requires the owner to safely drain the folios before proceeding. This change breaks out of the hotunplug attempt entirely when a fatal migration failure occurs, rather than spinning indefinitely on a failed migration attempt.
